# Àwọn Ìpínlẹ̀ Ìwakùsà Zcash

## Kí ni ìsọ̀rí ìwakùsà Zcash?

Zcash mining pools are services that allow individual miners to combine their computing power (hashrate). By pooling resources, participants increase their odds of solving network blocks and earn consistent, smaller payouts rather than relying on solo mining's unpredictable lottery system.

---

## Àtòjọ àwọn Ìpínlẹ̀ Ìwakùsà Zcash:

---

### [Odò Ìṣàn (Odò Ọpọlọ) ]](https://braiins.com/pool)

<a href="https://binance.com">
    <img src="https://github.com/gorgagian123/Exchanges-Logo/blob/main/braiins_logo.jpg?raw=true" alt="Slush Pool (Braiins Pool) Logo" width="200" height="100"/>
</a>

- Ojú-ìwé: [Slush Pool (Brain's Pool) ]](https://braiins.com/pool)
- Àwọn Ìsanwó Àdáni: BẸẸNI
- Irú Àkójọ: Sanwó Nípa Ìpín
- Owó ìsúná: 2%

---

### [Ìtẹ́lógo](https://luxor.tech/)

<a href="https://binance.com">
    <img src="https://github.com/gorgagian123/Exchanges-Logo/blob/main/Luxor%20Pool.png?raw=true" alt="Luxor Logo" width="200" height="100"/>
</a>

- Ìkànnì: [Luxor](https://luxor.tech/)
- Àwọn Ìsanwó Àdáni: BẸẸNI
- Irú Àkójọ: Sanwó Nípa Ìpín
- Owó ìsúná: 3%

- Irú Àkójọ: Sanwo Nípa N Ìkẹyìn

### [Zhash](https://zcash.zhash.pro/stats)

<a href="https://binance.com">
    <img src="https://github.com/gorgagian123/Exchanges-Logo/blob/main/Zhash.png?raw=true" alt="Zhash Logo" width="200" height="100"/>

- Àwọn Ìsanwó Àdáni: Kò sí
- Irú Àkójọ: Sanwó fún Àwọn Ìpínlẹ̀ N Tẹ̀yìn
- Owó ìsúná: 0%

- Irú Àkójọ: Sanwó fún Àwọn Ìpínlẹ̀ N Tẹ̀yìn
- Owó ìsọ̀rí: Kò sí ní gbangba

### [NiceHash ì í ì 'í ë ¤.](https://www.nicehash.com/blog/post/how-to-start-mining-zec-equihash-on-nicehash)

<a href="https://binance.com">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NiceHash Logo" width="200" height="100"/>
</a>

- Ìkànnì: [NiceHash](https://www.nicehash.com/blog/post/how-to-start-mining-zec-equihash-on-nicehash)
- Àwọn Ìsanwó Àdáni: gba owó ní Bitcoin (BTC)
- Irú Àjọ: Ọjà Hashrate / Àjọ Proxy
- Owó ìsúná: 0,5% - 1%
